subcodes.title: Words to Fugeta, Mrs. P. et al, spoken on 1920-01-06
subcodes.first_line: Erelong- during this century. I treat myself always by diet. Yesterday I treated myself with this butter... One day at Adrianople I was with the Governor and we went to a garden where pears were growing.
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @health and healing; material and spiritual healing
